result.stdout:
Description:
  Kvit syncs your Consul KV values with file system

Usage:
  kvit [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  f, fetch           Fetch the given Consul KV directory to file system
  p, push            Pulls the given directory to file system
  d, diff            Show the differences between Consul KV directory and file system
  c, compare <file>  Compares the given key's content between Consul and file system

commands.payload:
Description:
  Kvit syncs your Consul KV values with file system

Usage:
  kvit [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  f, fetch           Fetch the given Consul KV directory to file system
  p, push            Pulls the given directory to file system
  d, diff            Show the differences between Consul KV directory and file system
  c, compare <file>  Compares the given key's content between Consul and file system

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compares the given key's content between Consul and file system

Usage:
  kvit compare <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  File name to compare

Options:
  --address <address>  Consul Url like http://localhost:8500
  --token <token>      Consul Token like P@ssW0rd
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Show the differences between Consul KV directory and file system

Usage:
  kvit diff [options]

Options:
  --address <address>  Consul Url like http://localhost:8500
  --token <token>      Consul Token like P@ssW0rd
  --all                List all differences, including identical files
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
